message:
Add prompt permalink pages (/prompts/[id])

- Server-rendered page with SEO metadata
- Full prompt content with variable substitution
- Copy, install, download buttons
- Variable inputs with localStorage persistence
- Context textarea for additional input
- When to use and tips sections
- Static generation via generateStaticParams
- Custom not-found page for missing prompts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
